description: User hovers over the handle of the trip cancellation cover slider.
interaction_target: Minimum cover for trip cancellation slider handle
frame_description: The user is on the 'Cover levels' page, looking at the trip cancellation cover slider.

description: User drags the trip cancellation cover slider from $10,000 to $5,000.
interaction_target: Minimum cover for trip cancellation slider handle
frame_description: The slider handle for trip cancellation is being moved to the left.

description: The displayed minimum cover for trip cancellation updates to $5,000.
interaction_target: Minimum cover for trip cancellation value display
frame_description: The value above the trip cancellation slider handle now shows $5,000.

description: User hovers over the handle of the baggage cover slider.
interaction_target: Minimum cover for baggage slider handle
frame_description: The cursor is positioned over the baggage cover slider handle.

description: User drags the baggage cover slider from $5,000 to $0.
interaction_target: Minimum cover for baggage slider handle
frame_description: The baggage slider handle is dragged to the far left position.

description: The displayed minimum cover for baggage updates to $0.
interaction_target: Minimum cover for baggage value display
frame_description: The value above the baggage slider handle now shows $0.

description: User hovers over the info icon next to 'Minimum cover for baggage'.
interaction_target: Information icon for baggage cover
frame_description: The cursor lingers over the information tooltip trigger for the baggage section.

description: User hovers over the handle of the baggage cover slider.
interaction_target: Minimum cover for baggage slider handle
frame_description: The cursor returns to the baggage slider handle.

description: User drags the baggage cover slider from $0 to $5,000.
interaction_target: Minimum cover for baggage slider handle
frame_description: The baggage slider handle is dragged back to the right.

description: The displayed minimum cover for baggage updates to $5,000.
interaction_target: Minimum cover for baggage value display
frame_description: The value above the baggage slider handle now shows $5,000.

description: User hovers over the handle of the baggage cover slider.
interaction_target: Minimum cover for baggage slider handle
frame_description: The cursor hovers over the baggage slider handle again.

description: User drags the baggage cover slider from $5,000 to $2,500.
interaction_target: Minimum cover for baggage slider handle
frame_description: The baggage slider handle is moved to the $2,500 position.

description: The displayed minimum cover for baggage updates to $2,500.
interaction_target: Minimum cover for baggage value display
frame_description: The value above the baggage slider handle now shows $2,500.

description: User hovers over the handle of the rental car excess cover slider.
interaction_target: Minimum cover for rental car excess slider handle
frame_description: After a long pause, the user moves the cursor to the rental car excess slider.

description: User drags the rental car excess cover slider from $0 to $2,000.
interaction_target: Minimum cover for rental car excess slider handle
frame_description: The rental car excess slider handle is dragged to the right.

description: The displayed minimum cover for rental car excess updates to $2,000.
interaction_target: Minimum cover for rental car excess value display
frame_description: The value above the rental car excess slider handle now shows $2,000.

description: User hovers over the handle of the rental car excess cover slider.
interaction_target: Minimum cover for rental car excess slider handle
frame_description: The cursor hovers over the rental car excess slider handle again.

description: User drags the rental car excess cover slider from $2,000 to $3,000.
interaction_target: Minimum cover for rental car excess slider handle
frame_description: The rental car excess slider handle is moved further to the right.

description: The displayed minimum cover for rental car excess updates to $3,000.
interaction_target: Minimum cover for rental car excess value display
frame_description: The value above the rental car excess slider handle now shows $3,000.

description: User hovers over the handle of the rental car excess cover slider.
interaction_target: Minimum cover for rental car excess slider handle
frame_description: The cursor hovers over the rental car excess slider handle once more.

description: User drags the rental car excess cover slider from $3,000 back to $0.
interaction_target: Minimum cover for rental car excess slider handle
frame_description: The rental car excess slider handle is dragged back to the far left.

description: The displayed minimum cover for rental car excess updates to $0.
interaction_target: Minimum cover for rental car excess value display
frame_description: The value above the rental car excess slider handle now shows $0.

description: User hovers over the 'Continue' button at the bottom of the page.
interaction_target: Continue button
frame_description: The user moves the cursor towards the 'Continue' button to proceed.
